name: Bronze Sword
desc: A bronze sword. Can't critical with it.

name: Slim Sword
desc:
Lightweight and easy to hit with
and also good for training skill.

name: Steel Blade
desc: A very heavy, but strong blade.

name: Rapier
desc: Eirika Only, effective against horseback and armoured units

name: Paragon Sword
desc:
Doubles experience gains.
Grants +5 Def when held.

name: Earth Sword
desc: Uses MAG to determine damage. Drains HP from enemy

name: Wind Sword
desc: Uses MAG to determine damage. Effective against fliers.

name: Bronze Lance
desc: A bronze lance. Can't critical with it.

name: Slim Lance
desc:
Lightweight and easy to hit with
and also good for training skill.

name: Flame Lance
desc: A lance infused with fire magic.

name: Infernal
desc: Darkness lance which can make it wielder crazy.

name: Reginleif
desc: Effective against horseback and armoured units.

name: Siegmund
desc: Ephraim only. Strength +5. Effective against monsters.

name: Guardians's Lnc
desc:
Powerful weapon of the guardians.
+3 Def and Res (Equip).

name: Bronze Axe
desc: A bronze axe. Can't critical with it.

name: Devil Axe
desc: Cursed by devil. Might injure its wielder.

name: Swordslayer
desc: Reverses the weapon triangle. Effective against sword fighters

name: Guardians's Axe
desc:
Powerful weapon of the guardians.
+3 Def and Res (Equip).

name: Bronze Bow
desc: A bronze bow. Can't critical with it.

name: Shining Bow
desc: A bow infused with light magic.

name: Short Bow
desc:
Lightweight and easy to hit with
and also good for training skill.

name: Heal
desc: Restores some HP to an adjacent ally

name: Mend
desc: Restores a lot of HP to an adjacent ally

name: Recover
desc: Restores all HP to an adjacent ally

name: Physic
desc: Restores some HP to a distant ally

name: Fortify
desc: Restores some HP to all nearby allies

name: Latona
desc: Fully heals and restores all allies

name: Illume
desc: Lights an area for three turns
components: 1 if (game.level_vars.get('_fog_of_war') and 'Illuminate' not in [region.nid for region in game._current_level.regions]) else 0

name: Trade
desc: Trade with a far away ally.

name: Silence
desc: Enemy is rendered unable to use magic.
components: "Tile" not in target.tags and (target.wexp['Light'] or target.wexp['Anima'] or target.wexp['Dark'] or target.wexp['Staff'])

name: Berserk
components: "Boss" not in target.tags and "Tile" not in target.tags

name: Entrap
desc: Moves a distant foe next to the user

name: Nightmare
desc: Puts all enemies to sleep for one turn

name: Hammerne
desc: Repair an item to full uses.

name: Obstruct
desc: Blocks a distant tile from being entered. Ends after three turns.

name: Rescue
desc: Bring an ally to a space adjacent to the user

name: Rescue
desc: Bring an ally to a space adjacent to the user

name: Warp
desc: Move an ally to another square.

name: Nosferatu
desc: User recovers HP equal to damage dealt.

name: Nightmare
desc: Sends all enemies in range 3 to sleep

name: Knife
desc: Can't critical with it. Poisons hit foes.

name: Iron Dagger
desc: A standard throwing knife. Poisons hit foes.

name: Steel Dagger
desc: A throwing knife made of steel. Poisons hit foes.

name: Silver Dagger
desc: A throwing knife made of rare metals. Poisons hit foes.

name: Stiletto
desc: A fighting knife intended for close combat. Poisons hit foes.

name: Dragon Medal
desc:
Medalion made by Naga's Scale.
Use this to gains a Dragon-type class.

components.desc_for_unit: This unit gains a Dragon-type class. This unit's attack will always be effective against "Dragon-type" units.
components.desc_for_other: Unit's attack is effective against "Dragon-type" units.
components.item_desc:
Medalion made by Naga's Scale.
This unit gains a Dragon-type class.

name: Dragon Medal
desc:
Medalion made by Naga's Scale.
Use this to gains a Dragon-type class.

components.desc_for_unit: This unit gains a Dragon-type class. This unit's attack will always be effective against "Dragon-type" units.
components.desc_for_other: Unit's attack is effective against "Dragon-type" units.
components.item_desc:
Medalion made by Naga's Scale.
This unit gains a Dragon-type class.

name: Torch
desc: Increases user's sight range in fog of war

name: Angelic Robe
desc: Permanently raises maximum HP by 7 points.

name: Metis's Tome
desc: Permanently raises all of the user's growth rates by 5.

name: Fili Shield
desc: Negates effective bonus of bows and wind magic toward user.

name: Hoplon Guard
desc: User is immune to critical attacks.

name: Knock Back
desc: If User initites combat, Foe moves 1 space away from User after combat.

name: Knock Back+
desc: If User initites combat, Foe moves 1 space away from User after combat. If Foe couldn't move back 1 space due to terrain limit, Foe suffered 10 damage.

name: Lunge
desc: If User initiates combat, User and Foe swap spaces after combat.

name: Drag Back
desc: If User initiates combat, User and Foe moves back 1 space to User's direction after combat.

name: Hit and Run
desc: If User initiates combat, User moves back 1 space after combat.

name: Cartas's Shield
desc:
The shield belonged to Duke Cartas.
At the start of each turn, if HP is
under half, recover to half.

name: Iote's Armor
desc:
The armor belonged to King Iote.
Halved bonus damage to the wielder,
negated critical attack.

name: Special Omelet
desc:
Mari’s Special Omelet for Martin.
(Permanently + 2 all stats, all weapon rank + 40 wexp).
Deal MAG damage and recover HP by half of the damage dealt.

name: Spell (Template)
desc: TEMPLATE for Mari's magic. Clone this item for each MariSpell entry, then set name/desc/icon, staffcast_weapon_type (element), weapon_rank, damage, hit, crit and ranges. Combat logic only depends on the matching MariSpell catalog row, never on this item's contents.
components: (item.hp_cost_override.value if item.hp_cost_override else {'E': 1, 'D': 2, 'C': 3, 'B': 4, 'A': 7, 'S': 8, 'SS': 10}.get(item.weapon_rank.value if item.weapon_rank else 'E', 1))

name: Spell Tome
desc: A study tome only Mari can read. Using it lets her learn one rank-appropriate spell, then the tome is consumed.
